title: Preparation, Infrared and Electronic Spectra of Some Copper(II) Acetoacetarylamide Complexes
author: M. N. PATEL
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Sardar Patel University, Vallabh Vidyanagar, Gujarat 

  Manuscript received 22 October 1973; accepted 1 March 1974  

 Copper(ll) complexes of acetoacetarylamide have been prepared. The infrared investigations of the complexes of copper(ll) indicate the coordination of these ligands to copper through oxygen atom which is indicated by a decrease in the C = O stretching frequencies. The complexes are all paramagnetic (  \(\mu\)   e  \(ff\)  = 1.68-1.76 B.M.). A square planar structure is suggested.
